# AgentCheck

> AI agent readiness scanner for any website. Free, open source.

## About
AgentCheck scans websites and scores them on how well AI agents (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity) can discover, read, and interact with them. It runs 18+ automated checks across 5 categories and provides actionable fix recommendations with code snippets.

## Features
- Free website scanning with score 0-100
- Auto-detects site type (e-commerce, blog, SaaS, restaurant, etc.)
- Protocol checks: llms.txt, ai.txt, robots.txt, UCP endpoint
- Structured data analysis: Schema.org, JSON-LD
- Agent accessibility: TTFB, JS dependency, API availability
- Conversion readiness: CTAs, forms, booking systems
- Trust signals: HTTPS, security headers, contact info
- AI-powered insights: competitor detection, smart recommendations
- Fix file generation: ai.txt, llms.txt, Schema templates, implementation guide

## Pricing
- Free: Scan + Score + Report
- Fix Files ($9): Tailored fix files for one scan
- Pro ($29/month): Unlimited fixes, monitoring, competitor comparison, AI discovery test

## API
POST /api/scan - Start a scan
GET /api/scan/{id} - Get results
GET /api/health - Health check

## Links
- Website: https://agentcheck.site
- GitHub: https://github.com/lennystepn-hue/agentready
